mapper.sql: pot.po_item_id AS pot_po_item_id, pot.po_id AS pot_po_id, pot.item_id AS pot_item_id, pot.po_item_name AS pot_po_item_name, pot.po_item_qty AS pot_po_item_qty, pot.po_item_unit AS pot_po_item_unit, pot.po_item_unit_price AS pot_po_item_unit_price, pot.po_item_amount AS pot_po_item_amount, pot.po_item_remark AS pot_po_item_remark

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN shipment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'completed' ELSE 'preparing' END AS po_shipment_status FROM shipments GROUP BY po_id ) sh ON sh.po_id = po.po_id

po.po_id, po.po_code, po.pi_id, po.po_issue_date, po.client_id, po.currency_id, po.manager_id, po.po_status, po.po_delivery_date, po.po_incoterms_code, po.po_named_place, po.po_source_delivery_date, po.po_delivery_date_override, po.po_total_amount, po.po_client_name, po.po_client_address, po.po_country, po.po_currency_code, po.po_manager_name, po.po_approval_status, po.po_request_status, po.po_approval_action, po.po_approval_requested_by, po.po_approval_requested_at, po.po_approval_review, po.po_items_snapshot, po.po_linked_documents, sh.po_shipment_status, po.created_at, po.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT ,
FROM purchase_orders po
LEFT JOIN po_items pot ON pot.po_id = po.po_id WHERE po.po_code = #{poId} AND po.po_status != 'deleted' ORDER BY pot.po_item_id

SELECT ,
FROM purchase_orders po
LEFT JOIN po_items pot ON pot.po_id = po.po_id WHERE po.po_status != 'deleted' ORDER BY po.po_id DESC, pot.po_item_id

SELECT ,
FROM ( SELECT po_inner.* FROM purchase_orders po_inner WHERE po_inner.po_status != 'deleted' ORDER BY po_inner.po_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) po LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN shipment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'completed' ELSE 'preparing' END AS po_shipment_status FROM shipments GROUP BY po_id ) sh ON sh.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN po_items pot ON pot.po_id = po.po_id ORDER BY po.po_id DESC, pot.po_item_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_orders WHERE po_status != 'deleted'

SELECT ,
FROM ( SELECT po_inner.* FROM purchase_orders po_inner WHERE po_inner.po_status != 'deleted' AND po_inner.manager_id IN
#{mid}
ORDER BY po_inner.po_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ) po LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po_id, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN shipment_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) THEN 'completed' ELSE 'preparing' END AS po_shipment_status FROM shipments GROUP BY po_id ) sh ON sh.po_id = po.po_id LEFT JOIN po_items pot ON pot.po_id = po.po_id ORDER BY po.po_id DESC, pot.po_item_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM purchase_orders WHERE po_status != 'deleted' AND manager_id IN
#{mid}
